zh.lifeSummary: 當John Sutton II於大約1308年出生在英國時，他的父親John Sutton I24歲，母親Margaret Somery19歲。他於大約1309年與Isabel Cherleton在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾杜德利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1359年11月16日在法國享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Sutton II于大约1308年出生在英国时，他的父亲John Sutton I24岁，母亲Margaret Somery19岁。他于大约1309年与Isabel Cherleton在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾杜德利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1359年11月16日在法国享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Sutton, named with Old English sūth ‘south, southern’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English surname is also common in Ireland (Wexford, Kildare), where it has been established since the 13th century and Gaelicized as de Sutún.
Jewish (from the former Ottoman Empire, including Syria): unexplained.
English: topographic name from Middle English (bi) suthentune ‘(at the place to the) south of the village’.

variants.name: Setton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avi, Ronit, Yossef.  French Andree, Henri, Jacques, Maryse.
Jewish (from the Ottoman Empire): altered form of   Sutton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Sutton II was born about 1308, in England, his father, John Sutton I, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Somery, was 19. He married Isabel Cherleton about 1309, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 16 November 1359, in France, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Sutton II est né environ 1308, à Angleterre, son père, John Sutton I, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Somery, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Cherleton environ 1309, à Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 16 novembre 1359, à France, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Sutton II um 1308 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Sutton I 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Somery 19. Er hat um 1309 in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Isabel Cherleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 16. November 1359 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Sutton II è nato il circa 1308 nel England, il suo padre, John Sutton I, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Somery, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Cherleton circa 1309, nel Dudley, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 novembre 1359, nel Francia, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Sutton IIが約1308年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Sutton Iは24歳，母Margaret Someryは19歳であった。約1309年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーでIsabel Cherletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1359年11月16日にフランスで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Sutton II(이)가 대략 1308년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Sutton I(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Somery(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1309년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리에서 Isabel Cherleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1359년 11월 16일 프랑스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Sutton II nasceu aproximadamente 1308, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Sutton I, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Somery, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Cherleton aproximadamente 1309, em Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 16 de novembro de 1359, em França, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Sutton II родился около 1308 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени John Sutton I было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Somery, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Cherleton около 1309 г. в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 16 ноября 1359 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Sutton II nació aproximadamente 1308, en Inglaterra, su papá, John Sutton I, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret Somery, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Isabel Cherleton aproximadamente 1309, en Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de noviembre de 1359, en Francia, a la edad de 52 años.
